Scan1 for traits with same covariates.

scan1covar.Rd

Modified from qtl2mediate version for newer data organization. Could build out a companion routine splitting on covariates.

Usage

scan1covar(
  pheno_mx,
  covar_df,
  genoprobs,
  kinship,
  peaks_df,
  model = "normal",
  ...,
  force = FALSE
)

Arguments

pheno_mx

matrix of phenotypes

covar_df

data frame of covariates

genoprobs

object with genotype probabilities

kinship

kinship matrix or list of kinship matrices

peaks_df

data frame of peaks information

model

model argument for scan1

...

additional arguments passed on

force

force pheno names to be in peaks

Value

object of class scan1.

On this page
